name: Pack Of 24 - Reflex Plus Canned Cat Food - Trout & Tuna in Jelly 400g
description: The Reflex Plus Tuna &Salmon Adult Cat Food in Jelly, offers high nutritional value and excellent digestibility thanks to quality animal protein and a diverse vitamin profile. Its rich moisture content supports daily hydration and assists kidney health. Key Benefits: High‑quality animal & fish‑derived proteins for digestibility Diverse vitamin and mineral mix to support overall health Elevated moisture content to bolster hydration and renal/urinary support Carefully formulated for adult cats’ nutritional needs Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives, Fish and fish derivatives (Trout 4%, Tuna 4%), Cereals, Derivatives of plant origin, Minerals. Nutritional Components Crude protein 8.5% Fat content 5% Crude fiber 0.5% Raw ash 2.5% Moisture Content 82% Nutritional Additives Nutritional supplements: Vitamin A 2360 IU, Vitamin D3 315 IU, Vitamin E 44 mg, Taurine 630 mg. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 17.6mg/kg), 3b103 (Iron 12.6mg/kg), 3b405 (Copper 1.9mg/kg), 3b503 (Manganese 3.2mg/kg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.5mg/kg), 3b801 (Selenium 0.03mg/kg). Nutritional Recommendation Serve at room temperature. • Clean, fresh drinking water should always be available. • If this food is new to your cat, introduce it gradually over a few days. • The exact amount of food for your cat may vary depending on many factors such as age, breed, weight, sex, and activity level. • Not suitable for human use.
